texto: Has your character ever been questioned because you ate or drank with sketchy people? Not everyone in the neighborhood is cleaned up and easy to be around. We need to be willing to follow Jesus and choose to be with others in uncomfortable situations, because we can't always expect people to come onto our turf; we must also be willing to enter their world. -The Art of Neighboring
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jay Pathak and Dave Runyon que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Has your character ever been questioned because you ate or drank with sketchy people? Not everyon…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, christian-living, because, com foco em reflexao.
